description_long: This is a sleek, black coupe car positioned on a rectangular section of asphalt road with dashed white lane markings. The car features a low, aerodynamic profile with a gently sloping roofline, characteristic of modern sports coupes. Its body is smooth and streamlined, with subtle curves and a compact, two-door configuration. The wheels are dark and sporty, complementing the overall aggressive stance of the vehicle. The windows are tinted and seamlessly integrated into the car's silhouette, enhancing its modern appearance. The car's exterior is finished in a glossy black paint, reflecting light and emphasizing its premium, performance-oriented design.
description: A glossy black, two-door coupe car with a low, aerodynamic profile and sporty wheels, set on a section of asphalt road.
description_view_0: Front view showing the car's sleek nose, low hood, and the central alignment on the road.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the coupe's two-door design, sloping roofline, and sporty wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the compact back end and rear window, with the car centered on the road.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the two-door coupe profile and streamlined silhouette.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
